description_long: This bungalow is a single-story, modern-style residential building set on a large, flat green plot. The structure features a flat roof and a clean, rectilinear layout with several interconnected white volumes. The main entrance is accentuated by a covered porch supported by multiple columns, and there are a few small outbuildings and landscaping elements, including trees and shrubs, scattered around the property. Windows are arranged in a mostly linear, asymmetrical pattern, with larger openings on the main facade and smaller ones on the sides. The exterior is predominantly white, with some subtle textural differences suggesting concrete or stucco surfaces. The overall design is minimalist, emphasizing open space and functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, covered porch, and minimalist landscaping on a spacious green plot.
description_view_0: From this view, the bungalow's main entrance and covered porch with columns are visible, along with a few outbuildings and a tree in the background.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front facade, showcasing the prominent porch supported by columns and the linear arrangement of windows.
description_view_2: Here, the rear and side of the bungalow are visible, with a focus on the flat roof, additional outbuildings, and a cluster of shrubs.
description_view_3: This angle shows the back of the bungalow, with fewer windows and a more solid, enclosed appearance, as well as the open green space behind.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with linear front and side windows
